title: DWP Customer Experience Survey: Benefit customers 2024 to 2025
body: "The Department for Work and Pensions (DWP) Customer Experience Survey (CES) is an ongoing survey designed to monitor customer satisfaction with the services offered by DWP. It looks at:   overall customer satisfaction with the service provided by DWP  customer experience questions which align to 4 customer experience drivers:  Get it Right Make it Easy Communicate Clearly Professional and Supportive   customer characteristics including equality measures and digital access   This report presents findings from interviews conducted with 9,029 benefit customers. Fieldwork was independently conducted by Ipsos (previously known as Ipsos MORI).  Research value  Findings from CES are used across DWP to inform improvements in service delivery.  "
